archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Premium Salon Concept

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-[#E8EAE6] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 rounded-2xl
surface_strategies.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8EAE6]

button.primary: bg-[#1B3B36] text-white hover:bg-[#122B27] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
button.secondary: bg-[#F0F2EE] text-[#1B3B36] hover:bg-[#E8EAE6] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all
button.outline: border border-[#E8EAE6] text-[#1B3B36] hover:bg-[#F3F4F1] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all

components.input: border-[#E8EAE6] bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1B3B36]/20 focus:border-[#1B3B36] rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm transition-all
components.badge: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#F0F2EE] text-[#1B3B36]

iconography.style: strokeWidth={1.5} for a thin, elegant, premium look

images.description: Spacious and stylish hair salon interior for login page background

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a premium SaaS dashboard tailored for high-end salons based on the exact specifications in this document.
Follow the 'Organic & Earthy' blended with 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype using the exact color codes provided. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors like slate or blue.
Use 'Playfair Display' for page titles and major metric numbers. Use 'Manrope' for all UI text, tables, and labels.
Adopt the 'Control Room Grid' for layout density, but give components breathing room using `p-6` or `p-8` inside cards. Ensure card borders are 1px #E8EAE6 to avoid heavy drop shadows.
Include Shadcn components (Tables, Calendars, Dialogs, Selects, Cards) heavily customized to reflect the premium aesthetic with `rounded-2xl` corners and custom button classes outlined here.
Implement an elegant dashboard layout featuring a Sidebar navigation and a sticky top-header using glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80`).

Develop the following views mapping to the SaaS requirements: Customer Management Dashboard, Service Catalog & Pricing, Appointment Scheduling Calendar, Billing & Invoice Generation, Staff Management, Inventory Tracking, and Analytics Dashboard.
Data visualization (Charts) should use Recharts or Shadcn Charts with a muted, elegant color palette (Greens, Golds, Soft Grays) rather than default bright colors.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="appointment-submit-button"`).
Include the provided media URLs (salon interiors, staff portraits, and luxury products) realistically across the UI to enhance the premium prototype feel.
